seo.title: Mazhaiye Mazhaiye Lyrics Eeram

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mazhaiye Mazhaiye'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the feelings of the protagonist in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie Eeram?

Eeram is a supernatural thriller that explores themes of love and loss, making this song a poignant addition to its narrative.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by the talented Haricharan, known for his expressive vocal style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Mazhaiye Mazhaiye' was composed by Thaman S, who is celebrated for his innovative soundscapes.

When was the song released?

'Mazhaiye Mazhaiye' was released on September 11, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Eeram, the song Mazhaiye Mazhaiye serves as a poignant reflection of the protagonist's emotional journey. The lyrics express a deep sense of longing and love, beautifully complemented by Haricharan's soulful rendition. This melody captures the essence of romance, evoking feelings of nostalgia and tenderness. As the story unfolds, this song becomes a significant emotional anchor, resonating with anyone who has loved deeply.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mazhaiye Mazhaiye from Eeram is a beautifully crafted melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Haricharan's soulful vocals and Thaman S's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet emotions of romance. Dive into the world of Mazhaiye Mazhaiye and let its soothing notes transport you to a realm of heartfelt memories.
stanzaMeanings: You, with your eyes, speak; when I see you, it's like rain in my heart.
I lived alone, but now you are my companion in this world.
This rain that falls is love; I have thought about it alone.
My heart, my heart, like a flame, it burns; it feels like a storm is coming.
I am here, I am here, I feel a fire inside; you are surrounding me with water.
Don't say anything; just be quiet. Don't move; just stay still.
When your dress gets wet, it creates a storm; your beauty brings a great flood.
Your face makes me feel like a soft breeze is blowing.
Because of your hands touching me, the rain is pouring down.
Enough, you go; my eyes are crying. Go away; you are destroying my world.
You, with your eyes, speak; when I see you, it's like rain in my heart.
I lived alone, but now you are my companion in this world.
